No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to health, well-being, or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is a tertiary education program (Target 4.3) focused on linguistics and grammar, directly providing analytical skills and knowledge (Target 4.4) essential for quality learning outcomes.
evidence: 屬於語言學的基礎課程之一
獲得語法分析的基本知識
習得不同類型語言及古今漢語語法分析之基礎能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course provides foundational grammar analysis skills, which are applicable to careers in teaching or research, indirectly supporting decent job creation and productive activities (Target 8.3).
evidence: 習得不同類型語言及古今漢語語法分析之基礎能力

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to reducing inequalities based on income, age, sex, disability, race, ethnicity, origin, religion, or other status.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course objective to 'understand major differences between ancient and modern Chinese and possess the ability to read ancient texts' directly supports safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to sustainable consumption, production patterns, or resource management.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or resilience.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to marine ecosystems or ocean conservation.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The administrative note 'Respect Copyright' (維護智慧財產權) provides a minimal, indirect link to promoting the rule of law and ensuring access to justice (Target 16.3).
evidence: 維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to global partnerships, finance, technology transfer, or capacity building.
